title: Comparing Your Real Options for Solutions When PayPal and Stripe Ban Your Account — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, and PayPal and Stripe have banned your account. You're not alone. Thousands of creators worldwide face similar restrictions due to geographic, banking, or Know-Your-Customer (KYC) requirements. Your digital income is at risk, but don't worry – we've got a solution. In this post, we'll compare the real options for selling digital products when PayPal and Stripe ban your account, focusing on a permanent structural alternative using crypto-native infrastructure.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are conventional payment gateways, but they exclude specific countries due to regulatory requirements or banking limitations. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure like NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) enable creators to sell digital products without relying on these restrictive platforms. Our solution provides a frontend wallet integration, multi-chain QR codes, and live price feeds, allowing buyers to pay in 300+ coins, including BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and TRX. This alternative infrastructure is not only more accessible but also more secure, with instant automated delivery and no payment processor account required.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

The conventional payment gateways are quick to ban creators from restricted countries, often without notice or explanation. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure is designed to be more inclusive and flexible. Our solution has been engineered to work with creators from a wide range of countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, Tanzania, and the Philippines. Our infrastructure is also constantly updated to accommodate new regulatory requirements and banking partnerships, ensuring that creators can continue to sell their digital products without interruption.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When PayPal and Stripe ban your account, you're not only losing access to payment processing but also facing significant fees and delays. Our crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, offers fast and secure payment processing, with instant automated delivery and no payment processor account required. This means that creators can focus on selling their digital products without worrying about costly fees or lengthy payment processing times. With our solution, you can sell your digital products with confidence, knowing that you'll receive your payments quickly and securely.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The conventional payment gateways often require manual intervention to deliver digital products, which can lead to delays and errors. Our crypto-native infrastructure, however, is designed to automate the delivery process, ensuring that buyers receive their digital products instantly and securely. Our solution includes a Core Shop Engine ($49.99) that handles automated delivery, payment verification, PDF receipts, and no payment processor account required. This means that creators can focus on creating more digital products without worrying about the logistics of delivery.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

When PayPal and Stripe ban your account, you have two options: continue to fight for access to their restricted platforms or switch to a more inclusive and flexible solution. Our crypto-native infrastructure is designed to work with creators from a wide range of countries and provides fast, secure, and automated payment processing. With our solution, you can sell your digital products without worrying about costly fees, lengthy payment processing times, or restrictive platform policies. Choose the solution that best fits your needs and start selling your digital products with confidence.
